name: Brownie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 12 x ½ inch pizza pan with foil (to lift brownie from the pan after baking) and grease the foil.
3. Microwave unsweetened chocolate and butter in a large microwaveable bowl on high for 2 minutes or until butter is melted. Stir until chocolate is completely melted.
4. Stir 2 cups sugar into the melted chocolate mixture. Mix in 4 eggs and 1 tsp vanilla extract until well blended. Stir in flour. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pizza pan.
5. Bake for 30 minutes.
6. Topping: In a separate bowl, mix cream cheese, ¼ cup sugar, 1 egg, and ½ tsp vanilla extract until well blended. Pour over the hot, baked brownie crust.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 10 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with fudgy crumbs. Do not overbake. Remove from oven and let cool in pan.
8. Carefully lift the brownie pizza out of the pan and peel off the foil. Place on a serving plate. Arrange fruit slices over the cream cheese layer. Drizzle with melted semi-sweet chocolate.
